code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Batch.Received.Event
    Batch.Received.Event --> Batch.Started.State
    Batch.Started.State --> Job.Received.Event
    Job.Received.Event --> Job.Received.State
    Job.Received.State --> Job.Completed.Event
    Job.Completed.Event --> Job.Completed.State
    Job.Completed.State --> Batch.Job.Done.Event
    Batch.Job.Done.Event --> Batch.Finished.State
    Batch.Finished.State --> [*]
    Job.Received.State --> Job.Failed.Event
    Job.Failed.Event --> Job.Failed.State
    Job.Failed.State --> Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event
    Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event --> Batch.Failed.State
    Batch.Failed.State --> [*]
    [*] --> Batch.Received.Failed.Event
    Batch.Received.Failed.Event --> Batch.Failed.State

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个批处理作业的状态流转图。整体流程是从初始状态收到Batch.Received.Event，然后进入Batch.Started.State，之后分发到具体的Job处理。
明白了，那Job的层级怎么处理？是每个Batch.Started.State之后会产生多个Job，还是单个Job？我需要确认Job.Received.Event和Job.Received.State的关系。
对的，Batch启动后会触发Job.Received.Event，然后进入Job.Received.State等待处理。Job执行完成后走Job.Completed.Event到Job.Completed.State，最后汇聚到Batch.Job.Done.Event。
好的，主干流程我先画出来了：从初始状态到Batch.Received.Event，再到Batch.Started.State，然后分叉到Job层级，最后通过Batch.Job.Done.Event进入Batch.Finished.State结束。
还需要考虑失败场景。Job执行可能失败，从Job.Received.State要能走到Job.Failed.Event，然后到Job.Failed.State，最后通过Batch.Job.Done.Failed.Event汇聚到Batch.Failed.State结束。
收到，那Batch本身在初始接收阶段也可能失败吧？是否需要从初始状态直接连到Batch.Received.Failed.Event？
没错，Batch.Received.Failed.Event之后进入Batch.Failed.State，和Job失败最终汇聚到同一个终止状态。这样所有失败路径都统一收口。
完成。现在图里有完整的正常流程：Batch从接收到启动，Job从接收到完成，最后Batch正常结束；以及两条失败分支：Batch接收失败和Job执行失败，都汇聚到Batch.Failed.State终止。
